mapper.insert: insert into nx_community_dispatch_driver_duty (nx_cdd_community_id, nx_cdd_driver_user_id, nx_cdd_route_date, nx_cdd_status, nx_cdd_checked_in_at, nx_cdd_checked_out_at) values (#{nxCddCommunityId}, #{nxCddDriverUserId}, #{nxCddRouteDate}, #{nxCddStatus}, #{nxCddCheckedInAt}, #{nxCddCheckedOutAt})
